<?php namespace Spatie\Ray\Concerns; /** @mixin \Spatie\Ray\Ray */ trait RayScreenColors { public function screenGreen(): self { return $this->screenColor('green'); } public function screenOrange(): self { return $this->screenColor('orange'); } public function screenRed(): self { return $this->screenColor('red'); } public function screenPurple(): self { return $this->screenColor('purple'); } public function screenBlue(): self { return $this->screenColor('blue'); } public function screenGray(): self { return $this->screenColor('gray'); } }
